_meta.description: Canonical governance contract for P31 Labs, Inc. — board structure, officers, conflict-of-interest declarations, meeting cadence, document retention. Single source of truth; all governance pages, board portals, and audit trails derive from this.

entity.stateNonprofitNote: GA state has approved 501 status (state-level nonprofit recognition); federal IRS determination letter still pending issuance

principalOffice.note: Operator address withheld for safety; mail forwarded via registered agent until office established

currentMembers.name: TBD-legal-name-on-file (operator's mother)
currentMembers._operatorNote: Family member; independence test fails for IRS purposes — note for Form 990 Schedule L disclosure of related-party. Replace placeholder with legal name before first board minutes published. Default role Treasurer; swap with tyler-001 in officers.current if Mom would prefer Secretary.

currentMembers.name: Tyler — TBD-last-name-on-file
currentMembers._operatorNote: Independence depends on relationship to founder/family — operator confirms 'independent' before applying. Replace placeholder with full legal name before first board minutes published.

board.recruitmentPriority: Vice-Chair (succession protection) + at least 1 fully-independent director (audit-ready independence ratio)

diversityTargets.principle: Skill-balanced, geographically distributed, lived-experience prioritized over pedigree

current.title: Treasurer
current.note: Default assignment; operator can swap with tyler-001 by editing this file

current.title: Secretary
current.note: Default assignment; operator can swap with mom-001 by editing this file

meetings.minutesPublic: redacted summary published within 30 days; full minutes available on request

categories.retainFor: later of 3 years after hire or 1 year after separation
discard when superseded unless legal hold

successionPlanning.founderUnavailableProtocol: Vice-Chair (when seated) becomes acting Chair; Treasurer + Secretary jointly authorized to maintain continuity for 90 days while board convenes

operatorMedicalContingency.scope: operations only; no policy changes, no fund disbursement >$1000
operatorMedicalContingency.duration: until operator returns OR 90 days, whichever is first

successionPlanning.mitigationStatus: founder is currently sole executor; recruitment of vice-chair is the highest-priority governance gap

auditFrequency.external: when annual revenue exceeds $250,000 OR per state requirement
